wash_trade_concerns: dYdX v4 (dYdX Chain) operates as an off-chain order book with on-chain settlement on its own Cosmos-based appchain, making CEX-style wash-trade detection difficult; reported 24h volume of ~$180M–$400M on CoinGecko as of mid-July 2025 appears broadly consistent with open interest levels visible on Coinglass (~$60M–$90M OI), suggesting volume is not grossly inflated, though off-chain matching limits full verification.
rationale: dYdX migrated from Ethereum (v3, StarkEx) to its own Cosmos appchain (dYdX Chain, v4) in late 2023; as of Q1 2025 the protocol reported cumulative trading volume exceeding $1.5 trillion since inception per dYdX Foundation blog posts. DefiLlama lists dYdX Chain TVL at approximately $130M–$160M as of July 2025, down significantly from its 2022 peak but stable since the v4 migration. Granular DAU/WAU/MAU figures and precise exchange-flow USD values for the DYDX token are not publicly available on free tiers of Glassnode or Nansen without a paid subscription; Coinglass does not carry DYDX-specific token flow data. Holder cohort (LTH/STH split) is similarly unavailable on free Glassnode tiers for DYDX.
